holdings.infoBox: TOK is an equity ETF with a total of 1141 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 5.78%, Apple at 5.13%, Microsoft at 3.33%, Amazon.com at 2.81%, and Alphabet at 2.54%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Kokusai ETF (TOK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Kokusai (World ex Japan) index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap developed market stocks outside of Japan. TOK was launched on Dec 10, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.
